name: Cornerstone OnDemand
description: Monitor Cornerstone OnDemand LMS user access and role-based access controls

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Cornerstone portal
2. Navigate to Admin > Tools > Edge > API Management
3. Click 'Register New Application'
4. Enter an application name (e.g. 'CompAI Integration')
5. Enter the User ID of an active admin user (this acts as the service account)
6. Under Scopes, select 'employee:read' and 'group:read'
7. Click 'Register Application'
8. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret immediately
9. Enter your portal hostname (e.g. mycompany.csod.com), Client ID and Client Secret below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Client ID from Admin > Tools > Edge > API Management

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Client Secret shown when registering the application. Copy it immediately - it is only shown once.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Cornerstone OnDemand users with their account status for access review

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Lists Cornerstone OnDemand user groups for role-based access control review
